items.title: Company Registration (MCA)
items.description: Register your company with the Ministry of Corporate Affairs under Companies Act 2013.

items.title: GST Registration
items.description: Mandatory for businesses with turnover exceeding ₹20L (₹10L for NE states).

items.title: PAN & TAN Registration
items.description: Obtain PAN for the entity and TAN for TDS deduction purposes.

items.title: MSME/Udyam Registration
items.description: Free registration for micro, small and medium enterprises for government benefits.

items.title: Shop & Establishment License
items.description: Required under state-specific Shops and Establishments Act.

items.title: Trade License
items.description: Issued by municipal corporations to operate a business in a specific area.

items.title: Import Export Code (IEC)
items.description: Required for businesses involved in import/export of goods or services.

items.title: Income Tax Filing
items.description: Annual ITR filing mandatory for all registered businesses. Due dates vary by entity type.

items.title: GST Returns (GSTR-1, GSTR-3B)
items.description: Monthly/quarterly GST return filing for registered businesses.

items.title: TDS Returns
items.description: Quarterly TDS return filing for businesses deducting tax at source.

items.title: Professional Tax
items.description: State-level tax on professions. Applicable in most Indian states.

items.title: Advance Tax
items.description: Quarterly advance tax payments if total tax liability exceeds ₹10,000.

items.title: Startup Tax Exemption (80-IAC)
items.description: DPIIT-recognized startups can claim 3-year tax holiday within first 10 years.

items.title: Employee Provident Fund (EPF)
items.description: Mandatory for establishments with 20+ employees. 12% employer + 12% employee contribution.

items.title: ESI Registration
items.description: Mandatory for establishments with 10+ employees. Provides medical benefits.

items.title: Minimum Wages Compliance
items.description: Adherence to central and state minimum wage rates for all employee categories.

items.title: Gratuity Act Compliance
items.description: Applicable to establishments with 10+ employees. Payment after 5 years of service.

items.title: Sexual Harassment (POSH) Policy
items.description: Internal Complaints Committee mandatory for workplaces with 10+ employees.

items.title: Employment Contracts
items.description: Written contracts recommended for all employees covering terms, NDA, and IP assignment.

items.title: Trademark Registration
items.description: Protect your brand name, logo, and tagline. Valid for 10 years, renewable.

items.title: Copyright Registration
items.description: Protect original works — software code, content, designs, and creative works.

items.title: Patent Filing
items.description: Protect novel inventions. Startups get 80% rebate on patent filing fees.

items.title: Trade Secret Protection
items.description: Implement NDAs and confidentiality agreements to protect business secrets.

items.title: Design Registration
items.description: Protect unique product designs. Valid for 10 years, extendable by 5 years.

items.title: Digital Personal Data Protection Act 2023
items.description: Comply with India's data protection law — consent management, data processing notices.

items.title: IT Act 2000 Compliance
items.description: Follow intermediary guidelines, reasonable security practices for digital businesses.

items.title: Privacy Policy & Terms of Service
items.description: Mandatory for all websites and apps collecting user data.

items.title: Cookie Consent Mechanism
items.description: Implement consent mechanisms for cookies and tracking on websites.

items.title: FSSAI License (Food)
items.description: Mandatory for food businesses. Type depends on turnover and operations.

items.title: RBI Guidelines (FinTech)
items.description: Compliance with RBI regulations for payment aggregators, NBFCs, and lending.

items.title: Drug License (Pharma/Health)
items.description: Required for manufacturing, stocking, or selling pharmaceutical products.

items.title: RERA Registration (Real Estate)
items.description: Mandatory registration for real estate projects with RERA authority.

items.title: Startup India DPIIT Recognition
items.description: Register with DPIIT for tax benefits, easier compliance, and funding access.
